identity.name: FlowIQ
identity.theme_strategy: Light Mode (Primary) with Dark Mode Support. Light mode uses 'Stone/Bone' warm neutrals; Dark mode uses 'Obsidian/Charcoal' deep neutrals.

rules: Numbers and Amounts must use 'font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums' for alignment.
Never use pure black text. Use Stone-900 (#1C1917) or Stone-800.

Card.styles: rounded-3xl border border-stone-100 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-sm shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300

Input.styles: rounded-xl border-stone-200 bg-stone-50/50 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-stone-900/10 focus:border-stone-900 transition-all h-12

Charts.style: Clean, minimal. No grid lines (or very subtle dashed). Rounded bar ends. Custom tooltips with glassmorphism.

visual_enhancers.noise: opacity-20 pointer-events-none fixed inset-0 z-50 mix-blend-overlay

universal_guidelines: Do NOT use gradients for text.
Do NOT center align the dashboard container; use a wide layout with a max-width.
Always use 'Manrope' for Headings and 'Inter' for Body.
Cards must have 'rounded-3xl' for the Apple-like aesthetic.
Use generous padding (p-6, p-8) inside cards.
instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup Fonts: Import Manrope and Inter from Google Fonts in index.css.
2. Configure Tailwind: Add colors (Stone, Emerald, Rose, Indigo) and borderRadius (2xl, 3xl) to tailwind.config.js.
3. Build Layout: Create a 'DashboardLayout' component with a floating glass header and a max-w-7xl content area.
4. Dashboard Page: Implement the Bento Grid (Mode A).
- Chart Section: Spending Overview (col-span-full md:col-span-8 row-span-2).
5. Smart Insights: Use simple logic to generate 'fake' insights for the MVP (e.g., 'Spending is 10% lower than last month').
6. Upload Page: Simple drag-and-drop zone with clear typography.
7. Interactions: Add hover effects to all cards and buttons.
